name: code-reviewer
summary: High-signal review subagent for bugs, regressions, and missing tests.

name: ci-runner
summary: Slash command that runs the repo's local quality gate and summarizes failures.

name: pr-reviewer
summary: Slash command for reviewing a pull request or local branch diff before merge.

name: docs-writer
summary: Skill for turning source changes into clear docs, release notes, and upgrade guidance.
